name: Vex

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Missile speed uses canonical ranged fallback (2000) because source champion payload omits basic-attack missile speed.

passive.name: Doom 'n Gloom
passive.description_source: Passive - Doom: Periodically,  Vex empowers her next basic ability to  knock down and briefly  fear enemies hit.

effects.description: Passive - Doom: Periodically, Vex empowers her next basic ability to knock down and fear enemies hit for 0.75 / 1 / 1.25 / 1.5 (based on level) seconds, during which they are slowed by 60% : 99% (based on distance from Vex). If Looming Darkness triggers Doom, enemies hit will flee from the epicenter instead.Doom's cooldown resets upon respawning.

Innate - Gloom: Nearby enemy champions and monsters that dash or blink will be marked with Gloom for 6 seconds. Vex's next basic attack, which becomes non-projectile, or basic ability hit against an enemy with Gloom will detonate the mark. Looming Darkness will also inflict Gloom, but cannot detonate it.

Gloom's detonation deals 40 : 162.94 (based on level) (+ 25% AP) bonus magic damage and refunds 25% of Doom's cooldown. Against non-champions, this instead deals 40% / 45% / 50% / 55% / 60% (based on level) damage and refunds 10% of Doom's cooldown.

passive.description: Passive - Doom: Periodically, Vex empowers her next basic ability to knock down and fear enemies hit for 0.75 / 1 / 1.25 / 1.5 (based on level) seconds, during which they are slowed by 60% : 99% (based on distance from Vex). If Looming Darkness triggers Doom, enemies hit will flee from the epicenter instead.Doom's cooldown resets upon respawning.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Gloom will mark Rift Herald and Rift Scuttler when they use their dashes.

basic_ability_1.name: Mistral Bolt
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Vex launches a wave of mist in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit. After a short delay, the wave accelerates but also narrows.

effects.context_notes: Active: Vex launches a wave of mist in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Vex launches a wave of mist in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit. After travelling 500 units, the wave accelerates but also narrows itself.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): This ability will cast from wherever the caster is at the end of the cast time.

basic_ability_2.name: Personal Space
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Vex emits a deafening scream around her, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies and  shielding herself for a short time.

effects.context_notes: Active: Vex emits a deafening scream around her before the cast time, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies and granting herself a shield for 2.5 seconds.
Active: Vex emits a deafening scream around her before the cast time, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies and granting herself a shield for 2.5 seconds.

effects.description: Vex can move during Personal Space's cast time.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Vex emits a deafening scream around her before the cast time, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies and granting herself a shield for 2.5 seconds.

basic_ability_3.name: Looming Darkness
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Vex tosses her Shadow to explode at the target location, dealing magic damage and  slowing enemies hit for a short time. The explosion widens based on cast distance.

effects.context_notes: Active: Vex tosses her Shadow to explode at the target location, dealing magic damage to enemies hit and slowing them for 2 seconds.
Active: Vex tosses her Shadow to explode at the target location, dealing magic damage to enemies hit and slowing them for 2 seconds.

effects.description: Killing an enemy with Looming Darkness refunds 10% of Doom's cooldown, increased to 25% for champion kills.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Vex tosses her Shadow to explode at the target location, dealing magic damage to enemies hit and slowing them for 2 seconds. The explosion's radius increases based on cast distance.

ultimate.name: Shadow Surge
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Vex sends her Shadow in the target direction, which deals magic damage to enemies hit. Shadow stops upon hitting an enemy  champion, marking and  revealing them for a few seconds.Shadow Surge can be recast while the target is marked.

effects.context_notes: Active: Vex sends her Shadow in the target direction, which grants sight around its trajectory and deals magic damage to enemies hit.

effects.description: Shadow stops upon hitting an enemy champion to mark them for 4 seconds, during which they are revealed. Shadow Surge can be recast while the target is marked.

effects.context_notes: Recast: Vex dashes towards the marked target with displacement immunity.
Recast: Vex dashes towards the marked target with displacement immunity.

effects.description: If Vex scores a takedown against Shadow Surge's marked target within 6 seconds of its application, Vex can cast Shadow Surge again within 12 seconds at no cost after 0.5 seconds, repeating the effects.

ultimate.description: Active: Vex sends her Shadow in the target direction, which grants sight around its trajectory and deals magic damage to enemies hit.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): This ability will cast from wherever the caster is at the end of the cast time.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata
manual verification of ability timing and execution semantics for context-note normalization

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
